productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Camel Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish camel colour bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease and style Flap overlapping the mouth with metallic closure and snake skin stripe for enhanced style Removable cross metallic chain with key pouch Zipper at the back for additional space Metallic embellishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
